reporting_unit: Filing reports in USD millions. All monetary values multiplied by 1,000,000 to convert to raw dollars. Share counts reported in millions and multiplied by 1,000,000 to convert to raw count. EPS reported as USD per share and left as-is.

company_mapping.revenue: us-gaap:Revenues - income statement line labeled Revenue
company_mapping.cost_of_revenue: us-gaap:CostOfRevenue - income statement line labeled Cost of revenue
company_mapping.gross_profit: us-gaap:GrossProfit - income statement line labeled Gross profit
company_mapping.research_and_development: us-gaap:ResearchAndDevelopmentExpense - income statement line labeled Research and development
company_mapping.selling_general_and_administrative: us-gaap:SellingGeneralAndAdministrativeExpense - income statement line labeled Sales, general and administrative
company_mapping.total_operating_expenses: us-gaap:OperatingExpenses - income statement line labeled Total operating expenses (R&D + SGA only; excludes COGS)
company_mapping.operating_income: us-gaap:OperatingIncomeLoss - income statement line labeled Operating income
company_mapping.interest_income: us-gaap:InvestmentIncomeInterest - income statement line labeled Interest income
company_mapping.interest_expense: us-gaap:InterestExpenseNonoperating - income statement line labeled Interest expense; gross interest expense is 63M; IS discloses interest income and interest expense separately so gross interest expense of 63M is the correct denominator for interest coverage
company_mapping.other_income_expense_net: us-gaap:OtherNonoperatingIncomeExpense - income statement line labeled Other income (expense), net
company_mapping.total_other_income_expense_net: us-gaap:NonoperatingIncomeExpense - income statement line labeled Total other income (expense), net

company_mapping.income_tax_expense: us-gaap:IncomeTaxExpenseBenefit - income statement line labeled Income tax expense
company_mapping.net_income: us-gaap:NetIncomeLoss - income statement line labeled Net income; this is also the CFO reconciliation starting line confirming consolidated basis with no noncontrolling interest separation
company_mapping.diluted_eps: us-gaap:EarningsPerShareDiluted - income statement line labeled Diluted
company_mapping.basic_eps: us-gaap:EarningsPerShareBasic - income statement line labeled Basic
company_mapping.diluted_weighted_average_shares: us-gaap:WeightedAverageNumberOfDilutedSharesOutstanding - income statement line labeled Diluted weighted average shares
company_mapping.basic_weighted_average_shares: us-gaap:WeightedAverageNumberOfSharesOutstandingBasic - income statement line labeled Basic weighted average shares
company_mapping.cash_and_cash_equivalents: us-gaap:CashAndCashEquivalentsAtCarryingValue - balance sheet line labeled Cash and cash equivalents
company_mapping.marketable_securities_current: us-gaap:MarketableSecuritiesCurrent - balance sheet line labeled Marketable securities; used as short-term investments in invested capital and net debt formulas
company_mapping.accounts_receivable_net: us-gaap:AccountsReceivableNetCurrent - balance sheet line labeled Accounts receivable, net; pure standalone line
company_mapping.inventories: us-gaap:InventoryNet - balance sheet line labeled Inventories
company_mapping.prepaid_expenses_and_other_current_asset: us-gaap:PrepaidExpenseAndOtherAssetsCurrent - balance sheet line labeled Prepaid expenses and other current assets
company_mapping.total_current_assets: us-gaap:AssetsCurrent - balance sheet line labeled Total current assets
company_mapping.property_plant_and_equipment_net: us-gaap:PropertyPlantAndEquipmentNet - balance sheet line labeled Property and equipment, net
company_mapping.operating_lease_assets: us-gaap:OperatingLeaseRightOfUseAsset - balance sheet line labeled Operating lease assets
company_mapping.goodwill: us-gaap:Goodwill - balance sheet line labeled Goodwill
company_mapping.intangible_assets_net: us-gaap:IntangibleAssetsNetExcludingGoodwill - balance sheet line labeled Intangible assets, net
company_mapping.deferred_income_tax_assets: us-gaap:DeferredIncomeTaxAssetsNet - balance sheet line labeled Deferred income tax assets
company_mapping.other_assets_noncurrent: us-gaap:OtherAssetsNoncurrent - balance sheet line labeled Other assets
company_mapping.total_assets: us-gaap:Assets - balance sheet line labeled Total assets
company_mapping.accounts_payable: us-gaap:AccountsPayableCurrent - balance sheet line labeled Accounts payable; pure standalone line not combined with accruals
company_mapping.accrued_and_other_current_liabilities: us-gaap:AccruedLiabilitiesCurrent - balance sheet line labeled Accrued and other current liabilities; contains embedded current operating lease liability of 300M per Note 14 and XBRL extensible list tag
company_mapping.total_current_liabilities: us-gaap:LiabilitiesCurrent - balance sheet line labeled Total current liabilities
company_mapping.long_term_debt: us-gaap:LongTermDebtNoncurrent - balance sheet line labeled Long-term debt; no current portion exists per calculation_components.short_term_debt confirmed zero
company_mapping.long_term_operating_lease_liabilities: us-gaap:OperatingLeaseLiabilityNoncurrent - balance sheet line labeled Long-term operating lease liabilities
company_mapping.other_long_term_liabilities: us-gaap:OtherLiabilitiesNoncurrent - balance sheet line labeled Other long-term liabilities
company_mapping.total_liabilities: us-gaap:Liabilities - balance sheet line labeled Total liabilities
company_mapping.total_shareholders_equity: us-gaap:StockholdersEquity - balance sheet line labeled Total shareholders equity; used as Total stockholders equity in invested capital formula
company_mapping.retained_earnings: us-gaap:RetainedEarningsAccumulatedDeficit - balance sheet line labeled Retained earnings
company_mapping.additional_paid_in_capital: us-gaap:AdditionalPaidInCapital - balance sheet line labeled Additional paid-in capital
company_mapping.accumulated_other_comprehensive_income: us-gaap:AccumulatedOtherComprehensiveIncomeLossNetOfTax - balance sheet line labeled Accumulated other comprehensive income
company_mapping.net_income_cf: us-gaap:NetIncomeLoss on CF statement starting line = 18775M; matches IS net income exactly confirming consolidated basis
company_mapping.stock_based_compensation: us-gaap:ShareBasedCompensation - CF statement addback labeled Stock-based compensation expense; also confirmed by us-gaap:AllocatedShareBasedCompensationExpense in IS xbrl_not_on_statement = 1474M; CF addback is source of truth per metric 13 rule
company_mapping.depreciation_and_amortization: us-gaap:DepreciationDepletionAndAmortization - CF statement addback labeled Depreciation and amortization; single combined line of 611M
company_mapping.capex: us-gaap:PaymentsToAcquireProductiveAssets - CF investing line labeled Purchases related to property and equipment and intangible assets = 1227M cash paid; includes intangibles per label; supplemental non-cash CapEx of 408M (CapitalExpendituresIncurredButNotYetPaid) is disclosed but not included in cash CapEx figure; cash-paid value of 1227M used in formulas per canonical rules
company_mapping.acquisitions_net: us-gaap:PaymentsToAcquireBusinessesNetOfCashAcquired - CF investing line labeled Acquisitions, net of cash acquired = 383M
company_mapping.net_cash_from_operations: us-gaap:NetCashProvidedByUsedInOperatingActivities - CF line labeled Net cash provided by operating activities = 27414M
company_mapping.net_cash_from_investing: us-gaap:NetCashProvidedByUsedInInvestingActivities - CF line labeled Net cash used in investing activities = -5216M
company_mapping.net_cash_from_financing: us-gaap:NetCashProvidedByUsedInFinancingActivities - CF line labeled Net cash used in financing activities = -15553M
company_mapping.operating_lease_current_analytical: us-gaap:OperatingLeaseLiabilityCurrent from BS xbrl_not_on_statement = 300M at 2025-04-27; embedded in Accrued and other current liabilities on BS face per extensible list tag; used in net debt and invested capital calculations
company_mapping.operating_lease_noncurrent_analytical: us-gaap:OperatingLeaseLiabilityNoncurrent = 1521M at 2025-04-27; this IS on BS face as Long-term operating lease liabilities
company_mapping.operating_lease_total_analytical: us-gaap:OperatingLeaseLiability from BS xbrl_not_on_statement = 1821M at 2025-04-27; equals current 300M plus noncurrent 1521M
company_mapping.short_term_debt_analytical: No current portion of long-term debt exists; commercial paper program has zero outstanding balance per Note 10; short-term debt = 0
company_mapping.effective_tax_rate: us-gaap:EffectiveIncomeTaxRateContinuingOperations from IS xbrl_not_on_statement = 14.3% for Q1 FY2026; cross-check: 3135 / 21910 = 14.31% confirming filing disclosure
company_mapping.sbc_by_function: us-gaap:AllocatedShareBasedCompensationExpense total = 1474M; by function from Note 2: cost_of_revenue 64M, R&D 1063M, SGA 347M; total matches CF addback
company_mapping.cash_interest_paid: us-gaap:OperatingLeasePayments available for lease but no explicit cash paid for interest supplemental line found in extraction; for metric 21 use income statement interest expense of 63M as approximation per implementation rule
company_mapping.intangible_amortization_from_notes: us-gaap:AmortizationOfIntangibleAssets from IS xbrl_not_on_statement = 159M for Q1 FY2026; embedded within cost of revenue and operating expenses; included within the 611M D&A on CF
company_mapping.revenue_per_employee: Metric 18 requires 10K employee count; this is a 10-Q filing; most recent 10K employee count must be carried forward from prior 10K filing; not available in this extraction
company_mapping.organic_vs_acquired_growth: Metric 22 flagged as not fully automatable in v1; 383M acquisition in Q1 FY2026 noted; revenue contribution from acquisition not disclosed in standardized footnote format in this filing

analytical.operating_lease_current_note: Current portion embedded in Accrued and other current liabilities on BS face per us-gaap:OperatingLeaseLiabilityCurrentStatementOfFinancialPositionExtensibleList; value 300M from BS xbrl_not_on_statement and Note 14
analytical.short_term_debt_note: No current portion of long-term debt on BS; commercial paper program has zero outstanding balance per Note 10; confirmed zero
analytical.long_term_debt_note: us-gaap:LongTermDebtNoncurrent = 8464M; same value confirmed by us-gaap:LongTermDebt in xbrl_not_on_statement; no discount/premium adjustment needed
analytical.net_debt_calculation: Short-term debt 0 + Long-term debt 8464M + Operating lease current 300M + Operating lease noncurrent 1521M - Cash 15234M - Marketable securities 38457M = -45227M (net cash position of 45227M)
analytical.short_term_investments_note: us-gaap:MarketableSecuritiesCurrent = 38457M labeled Marketable securities on BS; used as short-term investments in invested capital and net debt
analytical.interest_expense_note: IS discloses Interest income (515M) and Interest expense (63M) as separate line items; gross interest expense = 63M used for conservative interest coverage denominator per metric 16 rules
analytical.cash_paid_for_interest_note: No explicit supplemental cash paid for interest disclosure found in CF xbrl_not_on_statement; approximating with IS interest expense of 63M per metric 21 fallback rule
analytical.tax_rate_note: Computed 3135 / 21910 = 0.1431; filing discloses 14.3% effective rate in Note 4; using 14.3% consistent with both
analytical.sbc_expense_note: CF addback us-gaap:ShareBasedCompensation = 1474M; confirmed by us-gaap:AllocatedShareBasedCompensationExpense in IS xbrl_not_on_statement = 1474M; CF addback is source of truth
analytical.capex_note: Cash paid for PP&E and intangible assets per CF investing line = 1227M; supplemental non-cash CapEx of 408M excluded as it represents non-cash activity; absolute value used in formulas
analytical.acquisitions_note: us-gaap:PaymentsToAcquireBusinessesNetOfCashAcquired = 383M; treated as positive reinvestment outflow in reinvestment rate formula
analytical.intangible_amortization_note: us-gaap:AmortizationOfIntangibleAssets = 159M from IS xbrl_not_on_statement per Note 7; included within the 611M D&A total on CF
analytical.pure_accounts_payable_note: Accounts payable is a standalone pure line on BS; not combined with accruals
analytical.deferred_revenue_note: Current deferred revenue 1074M is a component of Accrued and other current liabilities per Note 8; noncurrent 1004M is component of Other long-term liabilities per Note 8
analytical.non_marketable_equity_securities_note: us-gaap:EquitySecuritiesFVNINoncurrent = 3240M embedded in Other assets per Note 8
analytical.operating_lease_payments_note: Supplemental lease cash flow disclosure from CF xbrl_not_on_statement Note 14; embedded in operating activities total
analytical.inventory_note: Breakdown from Note 8; includes 1.9B H20 inventory provision in Q1 FY2026
analytical.revenue_per_employee_note: Metric 18 requires most recent 10K annual employee count; this is a 10-Q filing and the 10K employee count is not present in this extraction; must carry forward from most recent 10K
analytical.organic_growth_note: Metric 22 flagged; 383M acquisition in Q1 FY2026 (Acquisitions net of cash acquired); revenue contribution from this acquisition is not disclosed in standardized footnote format; requires manual research override

prior_year_comparable_period.prior_year_cf_note: WARNING: The extraction shows identical values for prior year CF items to current year in many rows; this appears to be a data extraction anomaly where the prior year column values were not correctly populated for some CF items. The net totals for CFO 15345M, CFI -5693M, CFF -9345M are correctly differentiated and should be used as the reliable prior year CF figures. Individual CF line items for prior year Q1 FY2025 should be re-extracted or verified against the original filing before use in quarterly derivation calculations.
